nasb.text: When all the congregation saw that Aaron had died, all the house of Israel wept for Aaron thirty days.

esv.text: And when all the congregation saw that Aaron had perished, all the house of Israel wept for Aaron thirty days.

cnv.text: 全體會眾見亞倫死了，以色列全家就為亞倫哀哭了三十天。

ccb.text: 以色列全体会众得知亚伦离世，就为他哀悼了三十天。
